hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次；【FINANCE】美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响；【FINANCE】美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息。

items.title: Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices
items.summary: The central bank's so-called dot plot showed a median estimate of 3.4% for the federal funds rate, the same as at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 尽管油价飙升，美联储仍预计今年降息一次
items.summary_zh: 央行所谓的点阵图显示，联邦基金利率的中值为3.4%，与去年年底相同。

items.title: Fed votes to hold rates steady, notes 'uncertain' impacts from Iran war
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released its decision in interest rates.
items.title_zh: 美联储投票维持利率稳定，指出伊朗战争的“不确定”影响
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三公布了利率决定。

items.title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
items.summary: Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments require a more conservative approach.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事沃勒敦促目前保持谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息
items.summary_zh: 沃勒在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，最近的事态发展需要采取更加保守的做法。

items.title: As Islamophobia rises, Australia's Muslims celebrate Eid
items.summary: Recent events abroad and at home have fuelled an ongoing surge of Islamophobia in Australia.
items.title_zh: 随着伊斯兰恐惧症抬头，澳大利亚穆斯林庆祝开斋节
items.summary_zh: 最近国内外发生的事件加剧了澳大利亚伊斯兰恐惧症的持续高涨。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Bombed Thousands of Iranian Targets, but Iran Shows No Sign of Backing Down
items.summary: A U.S. commander said allied attacks had degraded Tehran’s military. On Saturday, the United States and Britain said Iran had tried but failed to hit a distant joint base in the Indian Ocean with two missiles.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国轰炸了数千个伊朗目标，但伊朗没有表现出退缩的迹象
items.summary_zh: 一名美国指挥官表示，盟军的袭击削弱了德黑兰的军队。周六，美国和英国表示，伊朗曾尝试用两枚导弹袭击位于印度洋的一个遥远的联合基地，但未能成功。

items.title: Strategy set for second-biggest bitcoin buying quarter despite BTC price slide
items.summary: First-quarter purchases have reached 89,618 BTC so far, the most since fourth-quarter 2024, and the quarter is not yet over.
items.title_zh: 尽管比特币价格下滑，但仍为第二大比特币购买季度制定了策略
items.summary_zh: 到目前为止，第一季度的购买量已达到 89,618 BTC，这是自 2024 年第四季度以来的最高水平，而且该季度尚未结束。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: 'We want to work with people on new products'
items.summary: SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce indicates an openness to work with Wall Street on fresh exchange-traded fund products tied to cryptocurrencies and tokenization.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 谈 ETF：“我们希望与人们合作开发新产品”
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会委员 Hester Peirce 表示愿意与华尔街合作开发与加密货币和代币化相关的新交易所交易基金产品。

items.title: Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it
items.summary: After major rallies, metals were under pressure on Thursday as rising oil prices increased both inflation and growth worries.
items.title_zh: 铜与黄金一起遭遇大宗商品抛售。背后有一个令人担忧的原因
items.summary_zh: 在大幅上涨后，周四金属面临压力，因为油价上涨加剧了通胀和增长担忧。

items.title: Here are the five key takeaways from this week's Fed meeting
items.summary: While no one expected the Fed to cut — much less hike — at this meeting, the market always looks for clues about what's next.
items.title_zh: 以下是本周美联储会议的五个关键要点
items.summary_zh: 尽管没有人预计美联储会在这次会议上降息——更不用说加息了，但市场总是在寻找有关下一步走势的线索。

items.title: Here's what changed in the new Fed statement
items.summary: This is a comparison of Wednesday's Federal Open Market Committee statement with the one issued after the Fed's previous policymaking meeting in January.
items.title_zh: 这是新的美联储声明中的变化
items.summary_zh: 这是周三联邦公开市场委员会声明与美联储 1 月份上次政策制定会议后发布的声明的比较。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase taps A'ja Wilson, Tom Brady for new athlete wealth management push
items.summary: JPMorgan's move reflects growing competition among banks and wealth managers to serve athletes, who are increasingly becoming entrepreneurs and investors.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通聘请阿贾·威尔逊和汤姆·布雷迪推动新运动员财富管理
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的此举反映了银行和财富管理机构之间为服务运动员而日益激烈的竞争，而运动员正日益成为企业家和投资者。

items.title: Watch: Thick smoke billows from South Korea car parts plant in deadly fire
items.summary: Eleven people were killed and dozens injured when a huge blaze engulfed a car parts factory in the central city of Daejeon.
items.title_zh: 观看：韩国汽车零部件工厂发生致命火灾，浓烟滚滚
items.summary_zh: 中部城市大田的一家汽车零部件工厂发生大火，造成 11 人死亡、数十人受伤。

items.title: Zelensky Sends Negotiators to the U.S., Hoping to Revive Peace Talks
items.summary: The Ukrainian president has said he has a “very bad feeling” about the effects of the Iran conflict on Ukraine’s own war.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基派谈判代表前往美国，希望重启和谈
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰总统表示，他对伊朗冲突对乌克兰自身战争的影响有“非常不好的预感”。

items.title: Iranian Sailors, Including Survivors of Torpedoed Ship, Remain in Limbo
items.summary: Sri Lanka has kept more than 250 sailors in protective custody since the early days of the war. Iran wants them back, but Sri Lanka is unsure what to do with them.
items.title_zh: 伊朗水手，包括被鱼雷袭击的船只的幸存者，仍处于困境
items.summary_zh: 自战争初期以来，斯里兰卡已对 250 多名水手进行保护性拘留。伊朗希望他们回来，但斯里兰卡不知道如何处理他们。

items.title: A Public Holiday Every Week? Sri Lankans Bemoan the Enforced Day Off.
items.summary: The island’s government, rationing fuel amid shortages from the Iran war, surprised residents by imposing an unusual four-day week.
items.title_zh: 每周都有公共假期？斯里兰卡人哀叹强制休假。
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争造成的燃料短缺，该岛政府实行了燃料短缺，但实行了不同寻常的每周工作四天的做法，令居民感到惊讶。

items.title: The 5-cent contract that debunked a wartime death conspiracy
items.summary: When social media declared Netanyahu dead, crypto prediction markets priced it at 5%. The money was right — and Washington wants to shut it down.
items.title_zh: 揭穿战时死亡阴谋的 5 美分合约
items.summary_zh: 当社交媒体宣布内塔尼亚胡死亡时，加密货币预测市场将其定价为 5%。这笔钱是对的——而华盛顿想关闭它。

items.title: It could cost you up to $6 million to grab lunch with Donald Trump
items.summary: Qualifying for Trump’s crypto gala can cost as little as $70,000 or as much as several million, with rankings driven by timing and strategy rather than sheer holdings.
items.title_zh: 与唐纳德·特朗普共进午餐可能要花费高达 600 万美元
items.summary_zh: 获得参加特朗普加密货币盛会的费用可能低至 7 万美元，也可能高达数百万美元，排名由时机和策略而非纯粹的持股决定。

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried tries to get on Donald Trump’s good side by backing his Iran strikes
items.summary: The jailed founder of bankrupt crypto exchange FTX is fueling growing speculation that he is seeking a presidential pardon.
items.title_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德试图通过支持唐纳德·特朗普对伊朗的打击来站在他一边
items.summary_zh: 破产的加密货币交易所 FTX 的入狱创始人越来越多地猜测他正在寻求总统赦免。

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's past political cash gives AI PAC fuel for bashing NY candidate Bores
items.summary: A mailer from Think Big PAC told voters that the Democratic U.S. House candidate once got $100,000 in support from the former head of failed global exchange FTX.
items.title_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德过去的政治资金为 AI PAC 抨击纽约候选人博雷斯提供了动力
items.summary_zh: Think Big PAC 的一名邮件告诉选民，这位民主党美国众议院候选人曾获得失败的全球交易所 FTX 前负责人的 10 万美元支持。

items.title: Senators say they've reached compromise on yield to advance crypto market bill
items.summary: One of the major sticking points on the crypto market structure bill may be resolved, at least enough to move toward a Senate hearing to advance the bill.
items.title_zh: 参议员表示，他们已就收益率达成妥协，以推进加密货币市场法案
items.summary_zh: 加密市场结构法案的主要症结之一可能会得到解决，至少足以推动参议院举行听证会以推进该法案。

items.title: Grayscale files for HYPE ETF tracking largest onchain perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary: According to the filing on Friday, the Grayscale HYPE ETF would trade on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GHYP if approved.
items.title_zh: HYPE ETF 的灰度文件跟踪最大的链上 Perps DEX Hyperliquid
items.summary_zh: 根据周五提交的文件，如果获得批准，Grayscale HYPE ETF 将在纳斯达克交易，股票代码为 GHYP。

items.title: Lawmakers reach breakthrough with ‘agreement in principle’ over stablecoin yield in sweeping crypto bill
items.summary: Key negotiators in advancing sweeping crypto legislation have reached an "agreement in principle" around the treatment of stablecoin yield.
items.title_zh: 立法者在全面的加密货币法案中就稳定币收益率达成“原则协议”取得突破
items.summary_zh: 推进全面加密货币立法的主要谈判者已就稳定币收益率的处理达成了“原则协议”。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #108.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 108 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 趋势加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #204.

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 36 位。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: MIT and Hasso Plattner Institute establish collaborative hub for AI and creativity
items.summary: Jointly led by the MIT Morningside Academy for Design, MIT Schwarzman College of Computing, and the Hasso Plattner Institute in Potsdam, the hub will foster a dynamic community where computing, creativity, and human-centered innovation meet.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院和哈索普拉特纳研究所建立人工智能和创造力合作中心
items.summary_zh: 该中心由麻省理工学院晨兴设计学院、麻省理工学院施瓦茨曼计算学院和波茨坦哈索·普拉特纳研究所联合领导，将培育一个充满活力的社区，让计算、创造力和以人为本的创新相遇。

items.title: Generative AI improves a wireless vision system that sees through obstructions
items.summary: With this new technique, a robot could more accurately detect hidden objects or understand an indoor scene using reflected Wi-Fi signals.
items.title_zh: 生成式人工智能改进了无线视觉系统，可以穿透障碍物
items.summary_zh: 借助这项新技术，机器人可以使用反射的 Wi-Fi 信号更准确地检测隐藏物体或了解室内场景。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
items.summary: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.
items.title_zh: 新分析显示，伊朗对美国使用的基地的袭击造成了 8 亿美元的损失
items.summary_zh: 大部分损失是在美国和以色列发起行动一周后伊朗发起的最初报复性袭击造成的。

items.title: The Road to the Battle of Hastings in 1066? Maybe Not a Road After All.
items.summary: New research suggests that a legendary 200-mile march by Harold Godwinson, the last Anglo-Saxon king of England, may have actually involved some ships.
items.title_zh: 1066 年黑斯廷斯战役之路？也许毕竟不是一条路。
items.summary_zh: 新的研究表明，英格兰最后一位盎格鲁-撒克逊国王哈罗德·戈德温森 (Harold Godwinson) 传奇般的 200 英里行军实际上可能涉及一些船只。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 02/23/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Monday, 02/23/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Evaluating Reversal Potential in Niche Alternative ETFs [Quantpedia] Alternative ETFs sit at an unusual intersection of pub
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 23 日星期一 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！评估利基另类 ETF 的逆转潜力 [Quantpedia] 另类 ETF 位于酒吧的一个不寻常的交叉点

items.title: Bitcoin options signal extreme fear as downside protection premium hits new all-time high, says VanEck
items.summary: Despite stabilizing spot prices, investors remain defensive, with leveraged speculation cooling and realized volatility dropping from 80 to 50, suggesting a cautious market sentiment.
items.title_zh: VanEck 表示，随着下行保护溢价创下历史新高，比特币期权发出了极度恐惧的信号
items.summary_zh: 尽管现货价格趋于稳定，但投资者仍保持防御态度，杠杆投机降温，实际波动率从 80 降至 50，表明市场情绪谨慎。

items.title: CFTC staff details how crypto firms can use digital assets as derivatives collateral in new FAQ
items.summary: The FAQ aligns the CFTC's framework with the SEC's recent haircut guidance, setting a 20% charge for bitcoin and ether and 2% for payment stablecoins.
items.title_zh: CFTC 工作人员在新的常见问题解答中详细介绍了加密货币公司如何使用数字资产作为衍生品抵押品
items.summary_zh: 该常见问题解答使 CFTC 的框架与 SEC 最近的削减指导保持一致，对比特币和以太币设定了 20% 的费用，对支付稳定币设定了 2% 的费用。

items.title: The Daily: VanEck says slowdown in bitcoin long-term holder selling signals ‘potentially constructive’ trend, Gemini hit with investor lawsuit, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 《每日报》：VanEck 表示，比特币长期持有者抛售放缓预示着“潜在的建设性”趋势，双子座遭受投资者诉讼等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: BitFuFu leans further into cloud mining as revenue mix shifts, profitability swings to loss
items.summary: The cost of mining bitcoin has climbed substantially over the past year, and miners are looking for steadier revenue streams.
items.title_zh: 随着收入结构的转变，盈利能力转向亏损，BitFuFu 进一步倾向于云挖矿
items.summary_zh: 过去一年，比特币开采成本大幅攀升，矿工们正在寻求更稳定的收入来源。

items.title: Tom Lee-linked Eightco ups equity stake in OpenAI to $40 million
items.summary: Ethereum treasury, Bitmine Immersion Technologies' Chairman Tom Lee recently joined Eightco's board of directors.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 关联的 Evenco 将 OpenAI 的股权增至 4000 万美元
items.summary_zh: 以太坊金库、Bitmine Immersion Technologies 董事长 Tom Lee 最近加入了 Evenco 董事会。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: A better method for identifying overconfident large language models
items.summary: This new metric for measuring uncertainty could flag hallucinations and help users know whether to trust an AI model.
items.title_zh: 识别过度自信的大型语言模型的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 这种测量不确定性的新指标可以标记幻觉，并帮助用户知道是否信任人工智能模型。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory
items.summary: Small caps are especially sensitive to changes in oil prices and a slowdown in the economic cycle.
items.title_zh: 以小盘股为主的罗素 2000 指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数
items.summary_zh: 小盘股对油价变化和经济周期放缓尤其敏感。

items.title: OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks
items.summary: People in China are rushing to buy preowned computers to try OpenClaw with demand for MacBooks particularly high, according to one reseller.
items.title_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 需求正在推高二手 MacBook 的价格
items.summary_zh: 据一位经销商称，中国人正争相购买二手电脑来尝试 OpenClaw，其中对 MacBook 的需求特别高。

items.title: Thousands evacuated as Hawaii faces worst flooding in 20 years
items.summary: More than 230 people have been rescued so far, the authorities said on Friday.
items.title_zh: 夏威夷面临20年来最严重洪水 数千人撤离
items.summary_zh: 当局周五表示，迄今为止已有 230 多人获救。

items.title: Pentagon restrictions on press violate First Amendment, judge rules
items.summary: The Department of Defense had required reporters to agree to certain rules on what information they could gather in order to maintain access to the Pentagon.
items.title_zh: 法官规则五角大楼对新闻的限制违反第一修正案
items.summary_zh: 国防部要求记者同意有关他们可以收集哪些信息的某些规则，以便保持与五角大楼的联系。

items.title: BTS make live return in front of huge crowd
items.summary: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook perform together for the first time since October 2022.
items.title_zh: BTS 在众多观众面前进行现场回归
items.summary_zh: RM、Jin、Suga、J-Hope、Jimin、V 和 Jung Kook 自 2022 年 10 月以来首次一起表演。

items.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
items.summary: Two children, aged 11 and 15, were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.
items.title_zh: 官员称，在美国会谈之前，俄罗斯无人机袭击乌克兰造成两人死亡
items.summary_zh: 两名分别为 11 岁和 15 岁的儿童也在扎波罗热发生的袭击中受伤。

items.title: Socialists battle to hold Paris in key mayoral elections across France
items.summary: Emmanuel Grégoire is facing a challenge from Rachida Dati on the right who is behind in the opinion polls.
items.title_zh: 社会党在法国各地关键市长选举中力争保住巴黎
items.summary_zh: 伊曼纽尔·格雷瓜尔面临着民意调查中落后的右翼拉奇达·达蒂的挑战。

items.title: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors, jury finds
items.summary: A San Francisco jury concludes Musk’s claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors.
items.title_zh: 陪审团发现埃隆·马斯克误导了 Twitter 投资者
items.summary_zh: 旧金山陪审团得出结论，马斯克在 2022 年的言论对 Twitter 投资者群体造成了损害。

items.title: Ukraine-Hungary oil pipeline row threatens EU loan
items.summary: Kyiv and Budapest disagree on how badly damaged a hub in western Ukraine bombed by Russia really is, as its oil flow remains suspended.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰-匈牙利石油管道争端威胁欧盟贷款
items.summary_zh: 基辅和布达佩斯对于俄罗斯轰炸的乌克兰西部一个枢纽的严重程度存在分歧，因为该枢纽的石油供应仍然暂停。

items.title: No Pills or Needles, Just Paper: How Deadly Drugs Are Changing
items.summary: Lab-made drugs soaked into the pages of letters, books and even legal documents are being smuggled behind bars, killing inmates and frustrating investigators.
items.title_zh: 没有药丸或针头，只有纸：致命药物正在发生怎样的变化
items.summary_zh: 实验室制造的药物渗入信件、书籍甚至法律文件的页面中，被走私入狱，导致囚犯死亡，并使调查人员感到沮丧。

items.title: BTS’s Comeback Show Was Heavy on Their New Album
items.summary: The concert in Seoul’s historic center was a grand homecoming for a pivotal force of South Korean soft power. RM, the group’s leader, performed through an ankle injury.
items.title_zh: BTS 的回归秀以他们的新专辑为主
items.summary_zh: 这场在首尔历史中心举行的音乐会是韩国软实力中枢力量的盛大归来。 RM是该组合的队长，他因脚踝受伤而参加了比赛。

items.title: ​At Least 14 Killed in South Korean Factory Fire
items.summary: Survivors jumped from windows to escape the blaze, the deadliest at a factory in South Korea in two years. Four people are still missing.
items.title_zh: 韩国工厂火灾至少 14 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 火灾是韩国一家工厂两年来最严重的火灾，幸存者从窗户跳下逃生。目前仍有四人失踪。

items.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
items.summary: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.
items.title_zh: 菲德尔·卡斯特罗的孙子在 Instagram 上炫耀啤酒、耐克和特朗普笑话
items.summary_zh: 桑德罗·卡斯特罗因其在 Instagram 上发布的帖子而受到密切关注，他在帖子中炫耀自己的奢华生活，同时用讽刺的方式指出他家族的领导力造成的恶化。

items.title: Chelsea Chief Under Abramovich Could Face Scrutiny Over Soccer Cheating
items.summary: A former key aide to the Russian oligarch would face an investigation into her time overseeing the Premier League club should she return to soccer.
items.title_zh: 阿布拉莫维奇领导下的切尔西主席可能因足球作弊而面临审查
items.summary_zh: 如果这位俄罗斯寡头的前关键助手重返足球界，她将面临对其监管英超俱乐部时间的调查。

items.title: Crypto firms cut hundreds of jobs in weeks, blaming weak markets, strong AI
items.summary: A wave of crypto job cuts in early 2026 exposes the gap between two convenient narratives: macro headwinds and AI transformation.
items.title_zh: 加密货币公司在几周内裁员数百人，归咎于市场疲软和强大的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 2026 年初的一波加密货币裁员潮暴露了两种简单叙述之间的差距：宏观逆风和人工智能转型。

items.title: How DeFi is quietly rebuilding the fixed-income stack for institutional capital
items.summary: The real institutional prize isn’t about tokenized assets. It’s about programmable yield.
items.title_zh: DeFi 如何悄然重建机构资本的固定收益堆栈
items.summary_zh: 真正的机构奖励与代币化资产无关。这是关于可编程良率。

items.title: Grayscale wants to bring the world's hottest crypto trading frenzy to your brokerage account
items.summary: The Hyperliquid network has seen significant growth, with weekly derivatives trading volume exceeding $50 billion and 24-hour fee revenue of $1.6 million.
items.title_zh: 灰度希望将世界上最热门的加密货币交易狂潮带入您的经纪账户
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 网络实现了显着增长，每周衍生品交易量超过 500 亿美元，24 小时手续费收入达到 160 万美元。

items.title: ‘Replacing humans is not close’: BlockSec challenges EVMBench on AI auditing
items.summary: “The real question is not ‘Can AI replace humans?’ but ‘How should humans and AI work together?’” BlockSec co-founder Yajin Zhou said.
items.title_zh: “取代人类还很遥远”：BlockSec 在人工智能审计方面向 EVMBench 发起挑战
items.summary_zh: “真正的问题不是‘人工智能可以取代人类吗？’而是‘人类和人工智能应该如何合作？’”BlockSec 联合创始人周亚金说。

items.title: Solana Foundation president says crypto gaming is dead
items.summary: While blockchain gaming has yet to live up to its promise, some companies, and top brands, have not given up.
items.title_zh: Solana 基金会主席表示加密游戏已死
items.summary_zh: 尽管区块链游戏尚未兑现其承诺，但一些公司和顶级品牌并未放弃。

items.title: Kalshi faces temporary halt in Nevada as court grants restraining order: reports
items.summary: Nevada is reportedly halting the operations of prediction market Kalshi within the state — at least for now.
items.title_zh: 由于法院授予限制令，卡尔希在内华达州面临暂时停止：报告
items.summary_zh: 据报道，内华达州正在停止该州预测市场 Kalshi 的运营——至少目前是这样。

items.title: Ledger appoints former Circle exec as CFO, opens New York office as firm explores potential US IPO
items.summary: The move builds on earlier reports that Ledger is exploring a New York IPO that could value it at more than $4 billion.
items.title_zh: Ledger 任命前 Circle 高管为首席财务官，并开设纽约办事处，同时公司正在探索美国 IPO 的可能性
items.summary_zh: 此前有报道称，Ledger 正在探索纽约 IPO，估值可能超过 40 亿美元。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 的更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: OpenAI Japan announces Japan Teen Safety Blueprint to put teen safety first
items.summary: OpenAI Japan announces the Japan Teen Safety Blueprint, introducing stronger age protections, parental controls, and well-being safeguards for teens using generative AI.
items.title_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布日本青少年安全蓝图，将青少年安全放在首位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Japan 宣布了日本青少年安全蓝图，为使用生成人工智能的青少年引入了更强有力的年龄保护、家长控制和福祉保障。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.

items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.

items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，而且它现在可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meets people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
